fields.heading: Care Jobs in London
fields.sub: Explore care jobs across Greater London with Vigil Care Staffing — healthcare assistant, support worker and care assistant assignments with a directly-vetted, DBS-checked agency.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing
fields.image_alt: A care worker supporting a resident in a London care setting

fields.heading: Find care work that fits your life
fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing places directly vetted, DBS-checked care workers into care homes, nursing homes and supported-living services across Greater London. Whether you are an experienced healthcare assistant, a support worker or looking to build a career in care, we match you to assignments that suit your skills, your availability and the areas you can travel to. We employ our people properly, check right-to-work documents on file and respond to every query within 15 minutes, so you always know where you stand. Browse the roles we recruit for below, then apply once and we will talk through the assignments that fit you.

items.title: Healthcare assistant jobs
items.body: Support residents with daily living, personal care and companionship in care and nursing homes across London.

items.title: Support worker jobs
items.body: Help adults live well in supported-living and community settings, focused on independence and wellbeing.

items.title: Care assistant jobs
items.body: Hands-on care roles in residential settings, with flexible shifts and ongoing assignments.

items.q: What care jobs do you recruit for in London?
items.a: We recruit healthcare assistants, support workers, care assistants and healthcare cleaners for care homes, nursing homes and supported-living services across Greater London.

items.q: Do I need experience to apply?
items.a: Experience in care is helpful but not essential for every assignment. We discuss your background during screening and match you to suitable work.

items.q: How are you different from other agencies?
items.a: We directly vet and DBS-check our people rather than passing on un-checked staff, and we respond to every query within 15 minutes.

fields.heading: Ready to start your next care assignment?
fields.sub: Apply once and our team will talk through the assignments that fit you.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing
